mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals tight labor market conditions that boost corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A concurrent rise in industrial production and manufacturing confidence signals robust supply-side growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show negative correlation with INDPRO/HOUST trends (Rank IC < -0.05) in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly contraction in real sales (RSAFS) below its 12-month moving average indicates weak consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where RSAFS falls below its 12mo MA.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in CPI inflation above 2.5% signals central bank hawkishness, causing equity market sell-offs over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous drop in payroll employment (PAYEMS) and rise in unemployment (UNRATE) signals economic contraction, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show positive correlation with PAYEMS/UNRATE divergence (Rank IC > 0.05) in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly contraction in GDP (GDPC1) below its 4-quarter moving average indicates economic stagnation, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where GDPC1 falls below its 4q MA.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in industrial production (INDPRO) above its 6-month peak signals strong manufacturing activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO exceeds its 6mo high.
